python -u -c 
import urllib.request
import os

output_dir = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1113_jphysiol.1965.sp007638/files'
os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)

urls_to_try = [
    ('https://cdn.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/instance/1357309/pdf/jphysiol01176-0094.pdf', 'cdn_ncbi'),
    ('https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC1357309/pdf/', 'pmc_pdf_dir'),
    ('https://www.cns.nyu.edu/~tony/vns/readings/barlow-levick-1965.pdf', 'nyu'),
    ('https://www.hms.harvard.edu/bss/neuro/bornlab/nb204/papers2006/barlow-levick-1965.pdf', 'harvard'),
]

output_path = os.path.join(output_dir, 'barlow_1965_ds-units-rabbit-retina.pdf')

for url, source in urls_to_try:
    try:
        print(f'Trying {source}: {url}')
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; ARF/1.0; mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk)'})
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as response:
            data = response.read()
            content_type = response.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
            print(f'  Content-Type: {content_type}, Size: {len(data)} bytes')
            if data[:5] == b'%PDF-' and len(data) > 10000:
                with open(output_path, 'wb') as f:
                    f.write(data)
                print(f'  SUCCESS: saved to {output_path}')
                break
            else:
                print(f'  SKIP: not a valid PDF (starts with {data[:10]})')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'  FAIL: {e}')

if os.path.exists(output_path):
    print(f'File exists at {output_path}, size={os.path.getsize(output_path)}')
else:
    print('No PDF downloaded.')
